name: AU Vetta Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 2 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on all purchases
6X Reward Points (12 RP per ₹100) on dining transactions
4X Reward Points (8 RP per ₹100) on travel bookings

cappedCategories.description: 6X accelerated dining rewards capped at 7,500 bonus RP per month
4X accelerated travel rewards capped at 5,000 bonus RP per month

welcomeBenefits.description: 2,500 bonus Reward Points on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver + 5,000 bonus Reward Points

additionalBenefits: 6X rewards on dining - one of the best dining reward rates
8 domestic + 2 international lounge visits per year
Lower forex markup of 2.5% compared to entry/mid tier cards
Complimentary golf rounds at select courses
pros: Excellent 6X rewards on dining (1.5% effective return)
International lounge access at a ₹2,499 price point
Generous milestone benefits with fee waiver at ₹3L spend
Good mix of dining and travel rewards
cons: Base earn rate of 0.5% is still relatively low
Point value of ₹0.25 limits overall reward value
Only 2 international lounge visits per year
₹2,499 joining fee is not trivial for a mid-range premium card
idealFor: Frequent diners who want maximized dining rewards
Users stepping up from entry/mid-tier cards to premium benefits
Those who need occasional international lounge access

faqs.question: How does the 6X dining reward work?
faqs.answer: On dining transactions, you earn 12 Reward Points per ₹100 instead of the base 2 RP. At ₹0.25 per point, this gives you an effective 3% return on dining compared to the 0.5% base return.

faqs.question: Which international lounges can I access?
faqs.answer: You can access international lounges through the Visa lounge network and Dreamfolks partners. You get 2 complimentary international visits per year, with additional visits charged at standard rates.

faqs.question: Is the 2.5% forex markup good?
faqs.answer: Yes, 2.5% is competitive for a card at this price point. Most entry and mid-tier cards charge 3.5%. However, super-premium cards can offer even lower rates of 1.5-2%.

faqs.question: How do milestone benefits work?
faqs.answer: When your annual spending crosses ₹1.5L, you get 3,000 bonus RP (₹750 value). At ₹3L spend, you get annual fee waiver plus 5,000 bonus RP (₹3,749 total value). These reset every card anniversary year.
